enum_values.name: Standard
enum_values.summary: Never returns unset plane. Will always calculate the plane even if nothing is stored.

enum_values.name: IncludeScaleTransforms
enum_values.summary: By default, the plane is orientation and rotation only. But scale transforms are stored if you need them.

enum_values.name: ReturnUnset
enum_values.summary: The object frame may be stored unset by default. If this is the case, and you want to know if it really is unset, this will tell you.
